scope_check.evidence: Reviewed outputs are within the schema and example artifact scope.

goal_contract_check.evidence: Required Goal Contract fields and hard gate concepts are represented.

question_fulfillment.evidence: The request for scored goal completion, scenario flow, and hard gates is covered.

functional_completeness.evidence: All planned schema and example artifacts exist.

scenario_flow_coverage.evidence: Goal-to-review and close-audit flows are covered.

regression_safety.evidence: Existing main-session delegation rules are preserved.

verification_completeness.evidence: Syntax validation evidence is available; lockfile-backed schema validation is future runner evidence.

scenario_flow_scores.evidence: The loop requires score >= 85, passed_threshold true, and empty blocking_gates.
Lifecycle events and close audit terminal states are represented.

build.evidence: No application build exists for docs/schema v1.

lint.evidence: Markdown fence and key field checks passed.

test.evidence: JSON/YAML syntax checks passed; schema validation requires a pinned dependency and lockfile-backed validator.

run.evidence: Runner execution is explicitly out of v1 scope.

behavior_check.evidence: Delegation, scoring, rework, hard gate, and close audit behavior are documented.

ux_workflow_completeness.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

visual_polish.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

responsive_desktop_mobile.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

accessibility_basics.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

error_loading_empty_states.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

text_overlap_layout_stability.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

domain_fit.evidence: This review covers schema and policy artifacts, not an app/product UI.

evidence.description: App-quality evidence is not required for this non-app schema/policy review.

security_check.evidence: No raw secrets, workspace escape, or unauthorized network/cost behavior is present.

secret_scan_result.evidence: No secret candidates were found in examples.

scope_diff_result.evidence: Changed artifacts are within the agreed docs/schema/example scope.

command_audit.command: node -e <parse json/jsonl and markdown fence checks>; js-yaml@4.1.0 <policy yaml>
command_audit.purpose: Validate artifact syntax without claiming executable runner validation.

command_audit.command: node -e <lint markdown fences and required key fields>
command_audit.purpose: Run lint-style checks for markdown fences and required schema/example keys.
command_audit.output_summary: Lint-style documentation and key-field checks passed.

command_audit.command: node -e <test json jsonl yaml syntax fixtures>
command_audit.purpose: Run syntax test coverage for JSON, JSONL, and YAML review artifacts.

risks_or_follow_up: Independent review completed and no follow-up is required.
